data.acceptance:
1. README quickstart's `curl … install.sh | sh` URL points at a tagged commit, e.g. `…/raw/v0.1.0/scripts/install.sh`.
2. The release workflow uploads `install.sh` itself as a release asset; the README also documents `curl …/releases/latest/download/install.sh | sh` as an alternative.
3. The script's first line prints its own SHA-256 (computed at build time) so an operator can spot-check.
